positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a wise, gentle-looking nocturnal owl perched on a branch, silhouetted against a vibrant, gradient sunset sky. The design should incorporate elements of subtle celestial bodies (crescent moons, faint stars) and delicate forest elements (swirling vines, glowing fungi). Focus on clean, bold lines and contrasting negative space. The composition must be centered and highly scalable for apparel printing, utilizing a deep indigo and burnt orange color palette with accents of teal and luminous gold. Vector art style, high contrast, tattoo design aesthetic, perfect symmetry, suitable for screen printing.
